signals.headline: Solana (SOL) Surges 10% on Alpenglow Upgrade and Record 167M Token Holders in April 2026 | YES | HIGH**
signals.raw:
Solana (SOL) Surges 10% on Alpenglow Upgrade and Record 167M Token Holders in April 2026 | YES | HIGH**  
The Alpenglow consensus upgrade, confirmed as slashing transaction finality from 12 seconds to 150 milliseconds, drives Solana's performance alongside an all-time high of 167 million monthly token holders and 148 million daily non-vote transactions as of April 14, 2026—bolstered by $1.71 billi

signals.headline: SEC Plans "Innovation Exemption" for Tokenized Securities Trading | YES | MED**
signals.raw:
SEC Plans "Innovation Exemption" for Tokenized Securities Trading | YES | MED**  
On April 21, 2026, the SEC announced plans for an "innovation exemption" mechanism to support compliant on-chain trading of tokenized securities, potentially boosting Ethereum and Solana DeFi ecosystems amid broader April bullish momentum from Layer 2 expansions and institutional clarity.[2][3]

signals.headline: Ethereum Nears $2,400 and Solana Rally on US-Iran Grand Deal Optimism | YES | MED**
signals.raw:
Ethereum Nears $2,400 and Solana Rally on US-Iran Grand Deal Optimism | YES | MED**  
Optimism from the US-Iran Grand Deal, easing geopolitical tensions as of April 16, 2026, fuels Ethereum's surge toward $2,400 with institutional inflows and Citi's $5,440 target, while Solana benefits from macro tailwinds and risk-on sentiment alongside Bitcoin eyeing $75,000.[2]

signals.headline: Trending Markets Category Booming | NO specific whale moves | HIGH confidence**

Trending Markets Category Booming | NO specific whale moves | HIGH confidence**  
166+ live markets under Trending Markets (e.g., “Nasdaq round-the-clock trading by June 30?”) show $2.8M volume, reflecting trader sentiment on news, crypto, and tech, but search results lack direct X posts on **whale bets, smart money, mispriced odds, or recent confirmations** like announcements resolving markets[1]
